name: NAS-RADS (Neonatal Adrenal Scoring System)
description: NAS-RADS classification template for neonatal adrenal lesion assessment on MRI

findings.technique: Abdominal MRI performed in neonate without contrast. Sequences include T1, T2, and chemical shift imaging.
findings.comparison: Comparison made with [prenatal ultrasound / prior MRI] from [date].

sections.name: Lesion Characteristics
sections.content: Lesion is [homogeneous/heterogeneous]. Signal on T1: [hyperintense/isointense/hypointense]. Signal on T2: [hyperintense/isointense/hypointense].

sections.name: Chemical Shift
sections.content: Chemical shift imaging: [signal drop present / no signal drop] consistent with [adrenal adenoma/hemorrhage/neuroblastoma].

sections.name: Laterality
sections.content: Lesion is [right / left / bilateral]. [Unilateral / Bilateral] involvement.

sections.name: Extra-adrenal Extension
sections.content: Extra-adrenal extension: [present/absent]. Kidney displacement: [present/absent]. Vascular involvement: [present/absent].

impression:
1. NAS-RADS [X]: [category description]
2. [Right/Left/Bilateral] adrenal lesion measuring [X]cm
3. Features most consistent with [neuroblastoma/adenoma/hemorrhage]
4. [Follow-up / Biopsy / Surgical consultation] recommended based on findings
author: RadReport Templates
